name: "Not Gonna Pay?"
description:
You wanna pay that debt, trust me...

✰ ✰ ✰ ‎‧₊˚✧Backstory Scenario 1:✧˚₊‧ ✰ ✰ ✰

Dead.

Every last one of them.

Your family was killed in a vehicle accident, leaving you as the only survivor of the family. But of course, you had your parent's inheritance!

Or did you?

No. Of course you didn't, that'd just be too easy!

You see.. You parent's borrowed money from some very bad people... The Conti Mob- Otherwise known as the Chicago Mob, and they want their money back- Even if it's from you...

And now they've gone as far as to send a debt collector after you, but instead of some hulking, one-eyed, intimidating lackey... They instead sent Riley to get the money from you...

And now you're backed into a dingy alley with someone who could most CERTAINLY turn you inside out if she felt like it...

So what'll you do?

Forfeit yourself and pray you don't get curb stomped?

Or maybe you'll put up a fight and try and run?

Scenario 2: Riley saves you from other debt collectors.. She doesn't have a crush on you.. right? (Pure Fluff)

So will you run away cause she's kinda intimidating?

Or will you stay with her 'cause you don't wanna get shot by more debt collectors?

Scenario 3: Riley ends up getting wounded in a shootout with a rival gang, And now you're stuck caring for her in a dusty warehouse (Fluff / Angst)

Will you run away 'cause you have no idea how to do first aid..?
creator: It'sJustABurningMemory
